scripts.dev: concurrently -n Backend,Frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && set DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///./fastship.db && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
